creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 205741
Proposed patch (since 503401 revision)

Hello.

I think, in case of LONG_PCF_NAMES option, possible to add some information about pcf:no-long-family-names property to files/pkg-message.in file, based on 2.8 changelog:
https://sourceforge.net/projects/freetype/files/freetype2/2.8/
For example:
-8<--
If LONG_PCF_NAMES port's option was enabled, it can be disabled at run time with
using pcf:no-long-family-names property. Example:

FREETYPE_PROPERTIES=pcf:no-long-family-names=1
-->8-

Also possible to include patches for closed bug reports after 2.10.1 release (in files/patch-2.10.1.diff):
bug #56580: Type 1: Problem with (badly formed) SEAC glyph
https://savannah.nongnu.org/bugs/index.php?56580
bug #56601: Odd behavior with variable hinted font.
https://savannah.nongnu.org/bugs/index.php?56601
bug #56587: Direct-leak (OSS-Fuzz 12809)
https://savannah.nongnu.org/bugs/index.php?56587

Attached patch with proposed changes.
